title.ko: 다른 단일의 서브클래스에는 완전히 포함되지 않는 식료품의 성형 또는 가공
title.en: SHAPING OR WORKING OF FOODSTUFFS, NOT FULLY COVERED BY A SINGLE OTHER SUBCLASS

definition.ko: 식료품의 성형, 가공에 관련되는 다른 서브클래스로서는 A23 외에 A01J, A21C, A22C, A47J, B02C에 주의할 것

title.ko: 제품에 의해 특정화되는 식료품의 성형 또는 가공
title.en: Shaping or working of foodstuffs characterised by the products
Securing foodstuffs on a non-edible supporting member
Agglomerating; Granulating; Tabletting
Agglomeration or granulation with pulverisation of solid particles, e.g. in a free-falling curtain
Agglomeration or granulation by extrusion or by pressing, e.g. through small holes, through sieves or between surfaces
Tabletting; Making food bars by compression of a dry powdered mixture
Encapsulation of particles, e.g. foodstuff additives
with oils, lipids, monoglycerides or diglycerides

title.ko: 자유로이 유동하는 분말 또는 인스턴트 분말의 제조, 즉. 액체가 첨가되었을 때 급격하게 환원되는 분말 (A23P 10/20, A23P 10/30이 우선 )
title.en: Making free-flowing powder or instant powder, i.e. powder which is reconstituted rapidly when liquid is added (A23P0010200000, A23P0010300000 take precedence)
using anti-caking agents or agents improving flowability, added during or after formation of the powder
using additives, e.g. emulsifiers, wetting agents or dust-binding agents

title.ko: 식료품의 피복; 그를 위한 피복물; 적층된, 다층의, 속을 채운 또는 속이 빈 식료품의 조제
title.en: Coating of foodstuffs; Coatings therefor; Making laminated, multi-layered, stuffed or hollow foodstuffs

title.ko: 식용 피복물을 사용한 피복, 예. 오일 또는 지방질을 사용하는 것
title.en: Coating with edible coatings, e.g. with oils or fats
Apparatus or processes for applying powders or particles to foodstuffs, e.g. for breading; Such apparatus combined with means for pre-moistening or battering
involving agitation of the foodstuff inside a rotating apparatus, e.g. a drum

title.ko: 액체 또는 반액체 제품을 사용하는 피복을 위한 기구 또는 과정
title.en: Apparatus or processes for coating with liquid or semi-liquid products
by dipping in a bath

title.ko: 스프레이 피복에 의한 것, 유동층 피복 또는 주물에 의한 피복 (브레딩과 결합된 것 A23P 20/12 )
title.en: by spray-coating, fluidised-bed coating or coating by casting (combined with breading A23P0020120000)
Making of laminated, multi-layered, stuffed or hollow foodstuffs, e.g. by wrapping in preformed edible dough sheets or in edible food containers
Filling or stuffing cored food pieces, e.g. combined with coring or making cavities

title.ko: 공정 또는 기구에 의해 특정화되는 식료품의 성형 또는 가공 (A23P 10/00, A23P 20/00이 우선 )
title.en: Shaping or working of foodstuffs characterised by the process or apparatus (A23P0010000000, A23P0020000000 take precedence)
Moulding
Extruding
Co-extrusion of different foodstuffs
Puffing or expanding
by pressure release, e.g. explosion puffing; by vacuum treatment
by extrusion-expansion
in discontinuously working apparatus

title.ko: 가열에 의한 것 (파열에 의한 팽창 또는 진공 처리와 결합된 것 A23P 30/32 )
title.en: by heating (combined with pressure release or vacuum treatment A23P0030320000)
Foaming or whipping
